title: uploadfile_accepts_valid_pdf_and_csv_within_size_limit
description: Verify that POST /upload-file accepts PDF and CSV files under 25MB with valid Authorization header and returns 202 Accepted immediately, offloading parsing and indexing to background tasks.

title: uploadfile_rejects_files_exceeding_size_limit
description: Verify that POST /upload-file rejects files larger than 25MB with a 413 Payload Too Large response.

title: uploadfile_requires_authorization_header
description: Verify that POST /upload-file without Authorization header returns 401 Unauthorized.

title: ask_endpoint_streams_llm_response_with_context_metadata
description: Verify that POST /ask with valid Authorization and executive user_role streams tokenized LLM output ending with the special delimiter and a final JSON context metadata payload.

title: ask_endpoint_enforces_rbac_for_employee_role
description: Verify that POST /ask with employee user_role and Authorization token scoped to employee returns 403 Forbidden when querying Executive-scoped content.

title: ask_endpoint_requires_authorization_header
description: Verify that POST /ask without Authorization header returns 401 Unauthorized.
